title: Migration Sub-Audit Recommendations
scope: Migration Strategy — GitHub, Secret Management, Cloud Hosting

findings.description: Immediate migration to Supabase Cloud (Sydney) to eliminate DB/Auth maintenance burden.

tasks.description: Create Supabase Cloud projects for Staging and Production in ap-southeast-2.

findings.description: Adopt GCP Cloud Run for all application compute (Melbourne) to support agentic workflow integration via Vertex AI.

tasks.description: Configure GCP Organization and Projects with Melbourne (australia-southeast2) defaults.

findings.description: Consolidate non-critical self-hosted services into a single-node Coolify environment.

tasks.description: Provision a single Ubuntu 24.04 VM and install Coolify.

findings.description: Consolidate secret management into GCP Secret Manager using Workload Identity Federation (OIDC).

tasks.description: Set up GCP Workload Identity Pool and Provider for GitHub Actions.
Bulk migrate secrets from Vault KV to GCP Secret Manager.

findings.description: Retire self-hosted ARC runners and transition all workflows to GitHub-hosted runners.

tasks.description: Update all .github/workflows to use runs-on: ubuntu-latest and standardize caching.

implementationPhases.name: Immediate De-risking
implementationPhases.rationale: High-maintenance k3s components are offloaded first.
